failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure feed reservoir is pressurized to maintain inlet pressure above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Accumulation of particulates or precipitates in the flow path
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and inspection schedule for BPR valve

failure_modes.cause: Failure of pressure relief system or excessive reaction rate
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant pressure relief systems and monitor reaction kinetics closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=10 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct a blockage test by introducing a known particulate into the flow and observing BPR response
Perform a pressure relief test to ensure system activates at 2.7 bar
